name: Fastest Cashier
short_description: "Fastest Cashier" is an exciting casual simulator game where you become a cashier in a bustling supermarket and must serve all customers within a limited time. You will skillfully scan items, accept payments, pack purchases, and pour yourself a cup of coffee to achieve high scores.
detailed_description:
"Fastest Cashier" is an exciting casual simulator game where you become a cashier in a bustling supermarket and must serve all customers within a limited time.
You will skillfully scan items, accept payments, pack purchases, and pour yourself a cup of coffee to achieve high scores.
As you progress through each level, the game's difficulty will increase, and you will face new challenges.

Game features:

Fast-paced gameplay
Variety of tasks
Mouse controls
3D graphics
